categories.label: Job Seeker / Career Changer
categories.description: You're actively looking for a new job or switching careers
top_uses: Write a tailored cover letter in 2 minutes instead of 2 hours
Research any company in 5 minutes — mission, culture, what they care about
Prepare for interviews with AI as your personal mock interviewer
Track applications and automate follow-up reminders — never miss a callback
categories.first_tool: Claude for cover letters + Job Search Orchestrator for full automation
categories.income_angle: You have time right now. Use it to learn AI — and arrive at your new job with a skill that pays 56% more from day one.

categories.label: Expert / Specialist
categories.description: Psychologist, doctor, lawyer, HR, finance — deep expertise, heavy admin
categories.time_saved: 90% faster on documentation and admin tasks
categories.money_impact: More clients, higher rates — without more hours
top_uses: Session notes written automatically — no more 30-minute post-session admin
Payment reminders go out by themselves — the awkward conversation disappears
Clients notified when their package is running low — without you saying a word
Research, summaries, and client-facing documents drafted in minutes
categories.first_tool: Claude for documentation + Calendly + Stripe for client automation
categories.income_angle: Your expertise is what clients pay for. AI handles the business around it — so you can see more clients and charge more.

categories.label: Educator / Coach / Trainer

Write personalized student feedback at scale without losing quality
Turn your expertise into a course, ebook, or workshop in days not months
Answer repetitive student questions automatically — focus on the hard ones

categories.income_angle: Educators who productize their knowledge earn while they sleep. AI makes the build 10x faster.

categories.label: Creative / Marketer / Content

Generate a month of social captions from a single brief
Write ad copy, email sequences, and landing pages 5x faster
Client reports and campaign briefs done in minutes not hours

Research any prospect in 5 minutes and craft a pitch that lands
Generate a full proposal from bullet points — no more blank-page paralysis
Prepare objection responses before every important call

categories.label: Manager / Ops / Supply Chain

Weekly status reports to leadership — drafted in minutes not hours
Spot anomalies in data without manual line-by-line review
Vendor emails, SOPs, and process documentation written in one prompt

categories.income_angle: Ops professionals who make their impact visible get promoted. AI makes your results impossible to ignore.

categories.label: Service & Craft Business

categories.money_impact: AI attracts and retains clients while you focus on your craft

No-shows handled with automated follow-up — no awkward calls from you
Social content written and scheduled while you're working
